_meta.description: Runtime tuning values for enviro_dash.py. Hot-reloaded automatically — no restart needed. Secrets and paths belong in .env, not here.
changelog: 2026-03-15 23:34:22 EDT  Initial config: calibration, intervals, sensor thresholds, display scaling factors.

2026-03-16 03:45:00 EDT  Calibrate gas thresholds to observed indoor baseline (247 rows). rd baseline 97-113 kΩ, nh3 baseline 152-187 kΩ. Old thresholds (rd green_min=150, nh3 green_min=500) were unrealistic.
2026-03-16 04:00:00 EDT  Update cal_actual_f 74.4→75.1 per overnight hygrometer reference (74.9-75.3°F).
